creator: driesm@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 205672
poudriere testport

Hi, 

Thanks for keeping the port up-to date with the latest upstream release!

I noticed that upstream fixed the X11 OFF build issue in their repository.
The patch file "files/patch-Makefile.am" can therefore be safely deleted.

In RELNOTES of 2.5: sfcsample: don't include X11 headers

In attachments a poudriere testport log without the patch from our repository (and in make.conf options_unset = X11) and a svn generated diff.
